issue.title: Illustrated empty state for Kanban 'No issues' columns (E57)

phases.title: KanbanColumn: replace bare 'No issues' text with illustrated empty state
verification: `KanbanColumn.tsx`: the empty branch renders the SVG-icon + label markup only when `issues.length === 0 && !isOver`; when `isOver` is true the empty branch renders `null`.
The inline SVG uses `stroke="currentColor"` and inherits color from `var(--text-tertiary)` via the `.kanban-column-empty-icon` class — no hard-coded hex.

`kanban.css`: `.kanban-column-empty` is `display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 100%; min-height: 96px; opacity: 0.5;` and uses `var(--text-tertiary)` exclusively for color.
Child classes `.kanban-column-empty-icon` (flex-shrink: 0) and `.kanban-column-empty-label` (font-size: 11px) are present and styled with tokens only.
The existing `.kanban-column--drop-target` rule and `.kanban-column-body` flex behavior are unchanged; the amber drop ring remains the sole drop-target signal.
`pnpm build` passes with no new TypeScript or vite warnings beyond pre-existing ones.
`pnpm test` is green (no regressions in the existing 89-test vitest suite).

Manual smoke verified: an empty kanban column displays a centered low-opacity tray glyph above the 'No issues' label; dragging a card over the empty column hides the illustration cleanly in favor of the amber drop ring.
phases.summary: KanbanColumn.tsx: replaced the bare 'No issues' div with a conditional block rendering an inline 28x28 tray SVG + label, suppressed when isOver is true so the amber drop-target ring remains the sole drop signal. kanban.css: rewrote .kanban-column-empty as a centered flex column at opacity 0.5 using var(--text-tertiary), added .kanban-column-empty-icon and .kanban-column-empty-label child rules. pnpm build clean and pnpm test green (shared 65, desktop vitest 89, Rust 28).
